headline: 3 Reasons to Sell DLTR and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Dollar Tree trades at $101.45 per share and has stayed right on track with the overall market, gaining 7.9% over the last six months. At the same time, the S&P 500 has returned 5.1%.

headline: Zip Launches AI Contract Orchestration, Giving Legal and Procurement Teams Back the Millions of Hours Lost to Manual Contract Review
summary: SAN FRANCISCO & LONDON, April 16, 2026--Zip Launches AI Contract Orchestration, Giving Legal and Procurement Teams Back the Millions of Hours Lost to Manual Contract Review
